headline: This year's Fortune 500 has 8 Wisconsin companies

headline: WEC Energy Group (WEC) Offers a Compelling Investment Case, Here is Why
summary: WEC Energy Group Inc. (NYSE:WEC) is one of the 11 best regulated electric stocks to buy now. As of June 4 closing, consensus sentiment around WEC Energy Group Inc.
